nasb.text: leave your offering there before the altar and go; first be reconciled to your brother, and then come and present your offering.

esv.text: leave your gift there before the altar and go. First be reconciled to your brother, and then come and offer your gift.

cnv.text: 就當在壇前放下供物，先去與弟兄和好，然後才來獻你的供物。

ccb.text: 就该把祭物留在祭坛前，先去跟他和好，然后再来献祭。

csbs.text: 就要把祭物留在祭坛前，先去与弟兄和好，然后再回来献上你的祭物。
